figures.caption: Figure 1: Wav2vec2-BERT 2.0 architecture showing the flow from raw audio input through convolutional feature extraction, transformer-based contextual encoding, and task-specific CTC head for ASR. The model was pretrained on 4.5M hours across 104 languages including Swahili.
Table 1: Swahili ASR performance across training configurations. Baseline refers to the 50K comparison model trained without CPT. ∆ represents relative improvement over baseline.
